description: Firewall rule version get fetches one historical rule version via GET. Both languages reject non-positive firewall_id and version with the same text; the missing-version message diverges (see report).

cases.name: rejects a non-positive firewall_id
cases.expect_error: firewall_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: rejects a non-positive version
cases.expect_error: version must be a positive integer
